This family comprises over 5,000 species found globally, in tropical and temperate regions. The genus Cynanchica is a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as dogbanes or swallowworts. Further classification of Cynanchica beckiana may involve more specific taxonomic categories, such as species rank or infraspecific ranks.
